name: galmail
description: GalMail — privacy-first, keyboard-first email for Gmail and Microsoft 365

scripts.build: bun run --filter @galmail/core-api build && bun run --filter './packages/*' build && bun run --filter './services/*' build && bun run --filter @galmail/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @galmail/core-api build && bun run --filter './packages/*' build && bun run --filter '*' typecheck
scripts.ci:js: bun run lint && bun run format:js && bun run typecheck && bun test
scripts.ios:check: xcodegen generate --spec apps/web/src-tauri/gen/apple/project.yml --project apps/web/src-tauri/gen/apple && xcodebuild -project apps/web/src-tauri/gen/apple/galmail-tauri.xcodeproj -scheme GalMailAppleTests -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build-for-testing && xcodebuild -project apps/web/src-tauri/gen/apple/galmail-tauri.xcodeproj -target GalMailNotificationService -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build && xcodebuild -project apps/web/src-tauri/gen/apple/galmail-tauri.xcodeproj -target GalMailShareExtension -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:rust:check: bun scripts/ensure-frontend-dist.ts && cargo check --manifest-path apps/web/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --target aarch64-apple-ios-sim
scripts.macos:rust:check: bun scripts/ensure-frontend-dist.ts && cargo check --manifest-path apps/web/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.quality:local: bun run lint && bun run security:check && bun run security:dependencies && bun run security:rust && bun test && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun scripts/check-budgets.ts && bun run bench && bun run e2e && bun run format:check && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path apps/web/src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --manifest-path apps/web/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && CI=true bun run tauri:build && git diff --check
scripts.format:check: bun run format:js && bun run format:rust
scripts.format:js: bunx prettier --check package.json 'apps/**/package.json' 'packages/**/package.json' 'services/**/package.json' 'services/{blind-relay,opt-in-processor}/src/*.ts' 'services/{blind-relay,opt-in-processor}/{tsconfig.json,wrangler.jsonc}' '.github/**/*.yml' 'apps/web/src/components/{ActionButton,SettingsPanel,ui-baseline.test}.tsx' 'apps/web/e2e/*.ts' apps/web/playwright.config.ts packages/providers/src/microsoft/*.ts scripts/security-policy.test.ts scripts/check-budgets.ts scripts/dependency-policy.ts scripts/platform-expansion.test.ts README.md SECURITY.md docs/architecture-decisions.md docs/crypto-review-checklist.md docs/deployment.md docs/diagnostics-policy.md docs/incident-response.md docs/oauth-architecture.md docs/oauth-review-prep.md docs/performance-budgets.md docs/platform-expansion.md docs/privacy-model.md docs/privacy-policy.md docs/product-spec.md docs/public-web-security-evaluation.md docs/release-candidate-checklist.md docs/release-policy.md docs/retention-deletion-policy.md docs/schema-versioning.md docs/security-requirements.md docs/status.md docs/threat-model.md benches/README.md
